title: Healthcare AI data handling training deck
description: Create a practical training deck for a regulated data-handling workflow.

question.query: Create a 12-15 slide training deck for healthcare employees on safe AI-assisted data handling. The deck should include learning objectives, policy principles, examples of allowed and prohibited data use, step-by-step decision guidance, two realistic scenarios, an interactive exercise, a short quiz, an answer key, and a final checklist. Include speaker notes for facilitators on at least six slides.
question.query_chinese: 为医疗行业员工制作一份 12-15 页的培训 PPT，主题是安全地进行 AI 辅助数据处理。PPT 应包括学习目标、政策原则、允许和禁止的数据使用示例、逐步决策指导、两个真实场景、一个互动练习、一个简短测验、答案 key 和最终检查清单。至少在六页中加入面向培训主持人的演讲备注。
